title: The Smile I Remember
content: Every morning, Ethan passed the same bakery on his way to work. One day, he noticed a young woman smiling as she left the shop with a bag of warm bread. Her smile stayed in his mind for the rest of the day. The next morning, he hoped to see her again. She was there, smiling just as brightly. After a few days, Ethan finally introduced himself. Her name was Lily, and their short conversations soon became the best part of every morning.
